Class PeriodStep

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.performance.PeriodStepMissingHoliday
grafioschtrader.reportviews.performance.PeriodStep
public class PeriodStep extends PeriodStepMissingHoliday
Represents a trading period step with complete financial performance data.

This class extends PeriodStepMissingHoliday to provide detailed financial metrics for a specific trading period, typically representing a single day or month within a performance analysis window. Contains all monetary values in the main currency (MC) for consistent reporting and analysis.

  • Constructor Details

    • PeriodStep

      public PeriodStep(LocalDate lastDate, double externalCashTransferMC, double gainMC, double marginCloseGainMC, double cashBalanceMC, double securitiesMC, double totalBalanceMC, int missingDayCount)
      Constructs a new period step with complete financial performance data.
      Parameters:
      lastDate - end date of this period step
      externalCashTransferMC - external cash transfers in main currency
      gainMC - investment gains in main currency
      marginCloseGainMC - margin gains in main currency
      cashBalanceMC - cash balance in main currency
      securitiesMC - securities value in main currency
      totalBalanceMC - total balance in main currency
      missingDayCount - number of missing data days

  • Method Details

    • getTotalGainMC

      public double getTotalGainMC()
